Ilya Sutskever, Safe Superintelligence SSI financial breakdown, 2026. **Safe Superintelligence Inc. has raised $6 billion in total funding and reached a $32 billion valuation since its June 2024 founding, according to the Globe and Mail. Sutskever co-founded OpenAI in 2015 and served as its chief scientist until leaving in May 2024; he founded Safe Superintelligence Inc. one month later with a single stated mission: build the first safe superintelligent AI. Unlike every other major AI lab, SSI has no commercial product and has committed publicly to keeping it that way until that mission is complete. SSI was incorporated in June 2024 by three founders: Sutskever; Daniel Gross, who had been Apple's AI lead; and Daniel Levy, a research scientist previously at OpenAI.
